questions.question: Name the duo who starred in Dumb and Dumber.
Name 3 of the 5 members of N*SYNC
questions.answer: Justin Timberlake, JC Chasez, Joey Fatone, Chris Kirkpatrick, Lance Bass

questions.question: With best-selling album Black Holes and Revelations, Matt Bellamy, Chris Wolstenholme, and Dominic Howard comprised what band?
The Branch Davidians were under seige for 51 days in 1993 in Waco, Texas. Who was their leader?
This was the Millennial verb for growing up and being responsible.
